rows.label: qev061001_MSG0049
rows.name:
Well? Did you find Kiliran? *fsssh*
Have you unlocked the disk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0050
rows.name:
Ah, I see that its contents are visible
now. Thank you so much! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0051
rows.name:
[ST:playername ], I can promise that your name will go
down in Zaruboggan history alongside the
results of this crucial research. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0052
rows.name: I will start it up immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0053
rows.name:
Oh... Oh! Oh my... This is Golbogga...
*fsssh* I never dreamed to find such
a wealth of information intact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0054
rows.name:
Wh-what?* fsssh* THIS is the true
face of Golbogga?! But then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0055
rows.name: *fsssssssssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0070
rows.name: Query[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Feloran what he has learned about Golbogga.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0080
rows.name: Wait[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0081
rows.name: Keep quiet and let Feloran think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0056
rows.name:
Y-yes. Apologies. *fsssh* It's just...
I'm just a bit shocked, honestly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0057
rows.name: But you deserve an explanation. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0058
rows.name: *fssssssssssssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0059
rows.name:
Ah. Apologies. I just... Well, seeing the true
face of Golbogga just came as something of a
shock. *fsssh* It took a moment to process.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0060
rows.name:
But you deserve an explanation.
*fsssh* Just give me a moment
to compose myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0061
rows.name:
*ahem* Yes. *fsssh* So this disk
does, in fact, contain a record
of Golbogga's appearance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0062
rows.name:
It seems that many Golboggas existed
in a previous civilization. And many
types of them, what's more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0063
rows.name:
*fsssh* But their appearance...
Those who birthed my kind and
washed Bedun in voltant were...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0064
rows.name:
They were nothing at all like us. *fsssh*
In fact, they looked like...humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0065
rows.name:
At present, I can't even begin to understand what the
implications of that might be. I'll need to spend more
time with the data on this disk first. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0066
rows.name:
Regardless, thank you for all
your assistance. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0067
rows.name:
Here is your compensation. *fsssh*
Take it with my compliments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0068
rows.name:
*fsssh* And if I may, one
final question before you go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0069
rows.name:
Was your Earth blanketed in the same
beauteous impurity as Bedun? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0090
rows.name: Confirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0091
rows.name: Explain that Earth was plagued by pollution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0100
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0101
rows.name: Say that Earth was beautiful and pure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0070
rows.name:
*fsssh* To think that such
a paradise once existed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0071
rows.name:
...Hmm? You seem sad. You should be
more proud of your homeworld. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0072
rows.name:
*fsssh* I see. So you had just begun in
your mission to shroud it in voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0073
rows.name:
Knowing you humans' determination,
I am certain it would not have
taken long! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0074
rows.name:
Hmm... Hearing that suggests that
similarities exist between your kind
and our gods all the more. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0075
rows.name:
A thirst to dig up everything beneath the soil,
and then lay waste to all above it! *fsssh*
And finally, in the end, to create...us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0076
rows.name:
Perhaps we ought look to humans to refine
their ways until they can become as a second
race of Golboggas to my kind. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0001
rows.name:
*fsssh* We successfully immigrated
to NLA thanks to your help, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0002
rows.name:
And I know you have aided
many of my kind since.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0010
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod in agreement.

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0020
rows.name: Downplay

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that you haven't helped the Zaruboggan that much.

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0003
rows.name:
You speak with confidence and
sincerity. *fsssh* No doubt that is
why we place trust in you so readily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0004
rows.name:
You speak with humility and grace.
*fsssh* No doubt that is why we
place trust in you so readily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0005
rows.name:
*fsssh* I truly believe you are the only
one to whom we can entrust this task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0006
rows.name:
Please help us learn the true
face of Golbogga! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0030
rows.name: Ask about Golbogga

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0031
rows.name: Press Feloran for more information about Golbogga.

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0040
rows.name: Ask about Task

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0041
rows.name: Press Feloran for details about the job.

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0007
rows.name:
Golbogga was a divine being who existed
on our homeworld of Bedun. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0008
rows.name:
We are taught that he bathed the
planet in a sea of voltant before
giving birth to our ancestors. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0009
rows.name:
I have been conducting research around the clock
to uncover the nature of this holy entity as he
existed before the Day of Regrowth. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Yet most evidence of Golbogga's
civilization was lost. *fsssh*
Dissolved in the sea of voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0011
rows.name:
However, I have just recently learned
that someone here on Mira bears a
piece of Golbogga's legacy! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0012
rows.name:
I would like to ask you to go and
accept that article from them. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0013
rows.name:
*fsssh* I would like you to
retrieve a piece of Golbogga's
legacy from a certain Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0014
rows.name:
All of that legacy was said to have been lost
on the Day of Regrowth. *fsssh* Lost in the
sea of voltant that swallowed our homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0015
rows.name:
I do not expect that they will
part with it easily. *fsssh* But
I am confident you will succeed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0016
rows.name:
What do you say? *fsssh*
Will you accept this task?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0017
rows.name:
*fsssh* Thank you. The article
is currently in the hands of a
Zaruboggan named Toluera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0018
rows.name:
He is a heretic. *fsssh* When we fled the Growth,
he refused to accompany the rest of us, preferring
instead to live alone in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0019
rows.name:
I do not know what he will demand in exchange
for the article, but I ask that you secure
it by any means necessary. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0020
rows.name:
That one record of the lost civilization
before ours could become the key to
untold discoveries. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0021
rows.name:
It could reveal the secrets of my
kind's origin and more. *fsssh* You
must help us to know our roots![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0022
rows.name:
Toluera refused to take asylum in
NLA with us, opting instead to
live alone in Cauldros. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0023
rows.name:
I never heard why, but he may have
good reason. *fsssh* You should
approach him with the utmost care.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0024
rows.name:
*fsssh* Did Toluera cede
Golbogga's legacy to you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0025
rows.name:
...I see. *fsssh* He asked for
a zirtodiamond in return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0026
rows.name:
While we were being held by the Growth, I
heard it mentioned that one was stored in
White Woods's Hilal Stronghold. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0027
rows.name:
Though I have doubts that something
so rare even on Bedun could really
exist in such a place. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0028
rows.name:
*fsssh* Did Toluera cede
Golbogga's legacy to you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Ah! Then this disk contains a record
of the lost era of Golbogga? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0051
rows.name: Nod in confirmation.

rows.label: qev061001_JNK0060
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev061001_SEL0061
rows.name: Tell him that Toluera said Golbogga never existed.

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0030
rows.name:
My heart is racing. *fsssh* To
think I will finally know the
face of the one who gave us life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hmm... That reminds me
of someone... *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Back when we were still on our homeworld of
Bedun, there was a troubled Zaruboggan who
claimed that Golbogga did not exist. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0033
rows.name:
Yes, I am sure of it now. His name was
Toluera. *fsssh* Such a sad individual.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0034
rows.name:
...But all of that matters not. *fsssh*
Not now that we have Golbogga's legacy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0035
rows.name:
*fsssh* I will set about investigating its
contents now. The long-concealed truths regarding
Golbogga will soon be brought to light![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0036
rows.name: *fsssssssssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0037
rows.name:
Hrmmm. Troubling. The disk is
encrypted. *fsssh* It seems it
can't be viewed in this state.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0038
rows.name:
I doubt anyone but Kiliran
could manage to get past
something this complex. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0039
rows.name:
I am most truly sorry to heap favor upon favor, but
could I ask you to show this disk to a Zaruboggan
named Kiliran and ask him to unlock it? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0040
rows.name:
He travels Mira performing voltant
geological surveys, so I'm afraid
he won't be easily found. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0041
rows.name:
I apologize for the inconvenience, but
please. *fsssh* We're but one final step
away from learning the truth about Golbogga.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0042
rows.name:
*fsssh* I don't know that I've ever seen protection
that thorough before. It was almost as if Golbogga
himself was hiding his nature from us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0043
rows.name:
Forgive me. That was terribly
unscientific. *fsssh* Please find
Kiliran and have him decrypt the disk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0044
rows.name:
*fsssh* Did Toluera cede
Golbogga's legacy to you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0045
rows.name:
...What?! You have chosen to side
with one who would deny Golbogga's
existence?! *fsssh* *fsssh* *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0046
rows.name:
But why? *fsssh* What could drive
you to endorse such blasphemy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0047
rows.name:
...You would choose Toluera, then? I
don't understand what you could see in
such a deviant unbeliever. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061001_MSG0048
rows.name:
*fsssh* I find your thinking
utterly inscrutable.[ST:wait ]
